scope: goal arc saturation: tutorial polish, manifest truth, and launch-evidence automation
headline: Session 28 targets three verified live gaps: first-run tutorial styling, manifest launch-state truth, and explicit no-fabrication launch evidence.

findings.title: The first-run tutorial defines its own CSS injector but the app never calls it
findings.evidence: `public/lib/tutorialCampaign.js` exports `injectTutorialStyles()`, but `rg injectTutorialStyles public test` only found the definition and no call site.
findings.recipe: Import `injectTutorialStyles` in `public/app.js`, call it before `mountTutorial()`, and add a browser-wiring assertion so the first-run challenge cannot silently lose its intended layout.

L1.recipe: Wire the existing injector and assert the call exists.

L2.recipe: Wire the injector and cover import/call ordering in the focused browser-wiring test.

L3.recipe: Move tutorial CSS into the main stylesheet with visual regression coverage across mobile and desktop.

findings.implementation: Imported and invoked injectTutorialStyles before mountTutorial; Playwright helper now dismisses the styled first-run overlay intentionally.

findings.title: The synthesized studio manifest claims SPARKED while active status and blockers keep the project public-unlaunched
findings.evidence: `context/STUDIO_MANIFEST.json.identity.vaultStatus` is `SPARKED`; `context/PROJECT_STATUS.json` is public-unlaunched and still blocks launch on on-domain email plus post-push public route evidence.
findings.recipe: Set the manifest vault status back to `FORGE` and add a studio smoke assertion that manifest launch state cannot outrun `PROJECT_STATUS.json` blockers.

L2.recipe: Correct the manifest and add a regression test for status/blocker coherence.

L3.recipe: Add a generated manifest refresh command that derives vault status from the canonical status file.

findings.implementation: Set STUDIO_MANIFEST identity.vaultStatus to FORGE and added a smoke assertion that active blockers/public-unlaunched status cannot coexist with SPARKED.

findings.title: The remaining SPARKED gate is evidence-driven but lacks a single repo-local report command
findings.evidence: `scripts/smoke-pages.mjs` proves the local static artifact, while `PROJECT_STATUS.json` still requires post-push route/domain evidence and `football@playfranchisearchitect.com` forwarding/copying verification before SPARKED.
findings.recipe: Add a static-host-safe launch evidence reporter that checks public routes when network is available, always records email forwarding as `unverified` unless explicit evidence is supplied, and exposes it through `ops.mjs` without ever flipping readiness automatically.

L1.recipe: Create a JSON report script with fixtureable probes and email-unverified output.

L2.recipe: Wire the script into `ops.mjs` and test both ready and blocked report aggregation.

L3.recipe: Feed the report into Launch Readiness UI state after an explicit post-push verification run.

findings.implementation: Added scripts/launch-evidence-report.mjs, ops launch-evidence, fixtureable tests, and a live evidence report under audits/ showing routes reachable but email forwarding unverified.

rejected: Speedrun Challenge hidden-surface premise was rejected: `game.html` already contains the panel and `gameFlow.js` loads speedrun status from Settings.
SPARKED flip is intentionally deferred: on-domain email forwarding/copying has not been verified and cannot be fabricated from repo code.
executionLog: implemented tutorial-style-injection; verified by browser-wiring and UI scenario
implemented manifest-vaultstatus-truth; verified by studio protocol smoke
implemented launch-evidence-report; verified by focused tests and live no-fabrication report
innovation-pack follow-through exhausted: latest audit now implemented; no marker or human-blocked candidates remain
